Thanks!

items.text:
📸** Suche Fotograf:in für Model-Digitals / Polaroids**

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich suche jemanden, der professionelle **Model-Digitals / Polaroids** von mir fotografieren kann – idealerweise im Studio mit cleanem Tageslicht-Look. Die Bilder sind für meine Sedcard und Bewerbungen bei Modelagenturen.

**TFP wäre super**, alternativ zahle ich auch gerne eine faire Aufwandsentschädigung.

Falls jemand Interesse hat oder jemanden empfehlen kann, freue ich mich über eine Nachricht. 😊

⸻

📸** Looking for a photographer for model digitals / polaroids**

Hi everyone! 👋

I’m looking for a photographer to shoot a set of professional **model digitals / polaroids**, ideally in a studio with a clean natural daylight look. The photos will be used for my modeling portfolio and agency applications.

**TFP would be great**, but I’m also happy to pay a reasonable fee if preferred.

Feel free to message me if you’re interested or know someone who might be a good fit. Thank you! ✨

NOW CASTING TEEN GIRLS IN LOS ANGELES!
16 to 19y
Do you love earrings and have an awesome ear stack? We're looking for a cool, outgoing teenage girl who already has at least two pierced holes in each ear and is open to adding another piercing to continue her stack.
💰 Pays $600 for the shoot
💰 PLUS an additional $2,500 if your images are selected for use in the social media and email campaign
📍 Los Angeles Area Only
📅 Shoots August 6–7
To submit, send us a quick video:
• Tell us a little about yourself
• Show us your earrings and ear stack
• Tell us why you love them and what they mean to you
We can't wait to see your style!

Email me at: Jacqui@pitmancastingprojects.com

CASTING CALL - VOLUNTEER
Hi all! We are casting for a short film, which is being created by a passionate crew of Capilano University alumni and students. 

This call is for the following 7 roles attached. 

It is volunteer and will be required for 1 day among the 4 dates listed below. If you already know that only a certain day will work among those, please let us know which. 

This film is art heavy, and some of the characters may be bearing quite a bit of make up.

If you are interested please email or DM me your headshots, mention which of the characters you are interested in (one or more), and if you have an acting reel, send that over aswell:

arjungillfilm@gmail.com

@arjungillfilm

P.S. If you are interested in the lead role, that call was posted in the group yesterday if you’d like to check it out.

items.text:
Vi søger 2 ensemblemedlemmer til FORVOKSET (ULØNNET)
På grund af et afbud søger vi 2 personer, der har lyst til at blive en del af forestillingen FORVOKSET.

📅 Periode: Juli – 18. august (ikke alle dage – skriv for prøveplan).

📍 Prøver: Hillerød og Gilleleje.

🎭 Spillesteder: Aveny-T, Remisen og Elværket.

Vi søger dig, der: 

• Har mulighed for at deltage i prøve- og spilleperioden.

• Har lyst til at indgå i et tæt og ambitiøst ensemble. 

• Er engageret, nysgerrig og klar på en intensiv og kreativ proces.

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig – alle er velkomne!

Om forestillingen:

Forvokset handler om den fortid og de traumer, der fortsat vokser i os som voksne. Forestillingen er en fortolkning og videreudvikling af udvalgte digte fra digtsamlingen Skyggesider af Janus Hald.

(Læs mere på facebooksiden  Oh no shiit eller instagram @oh.no.shit.insta )

Kan du træde til med kort varsel – eller kender du én, der kunne være interesseret? Så skriv til os hurtigst muligt.

Vi bliver meget glade, hvis du vil dele opslaget i dit netværk😊

Skriv til os på mail: oh.no.shit.kontakt@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

“Way Back Home” Short Film 

Logline: A Korean American mother walks the path of grief while navigating her cultural connection to her father’s roots. Her journey captures how the heavy, isolating weight of parental loss changes us forever. 

Production Title: Way Back Home

Compensation: PAID, Travel and hotel stipend 

Audition Information: Virtual/Selftape 

Shooting Schedule: 

    •    Zoom table read - TBD
    •    Shoot dates Sept 2-6 

Shooting Location: Denver and Fort Collins, Colorado 

Non-Union 

Email: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com

This supporting role is very important to the overall story. Without this character, the lead has no clear direction. With that said, finding an older Korean male can be difficult so no experience is required but there has to be a desire to want to learn and be open-minded! 

Character Breakdown: 

APPA / HARABEOJI (Supporting)
Korean / East Asian
Actor will portray Appa at different stages of his life (40s/50s, 60s-70s):
Taekwondo Master and Dojo owner. Immigrated to the U.S. in the 1970s. A man building a life in a new country. Controlled and guarded, yet with glimpses of warmth beneath the surface and quite charismatic in his joyfulness for life. His physicality and stillness should communicate strength, sacrifice, and quiet determination.
A commanding presence — disciplined, dignified, and physically strong despite walking with a cane. His exterior is firm and authoritative, shaped by hardship and sacrifice, yet he carries a profound gentleness with those he loves and has an infectious smile. His face reflects lived experience: resilience, pride, and unspoken pain.

Must speak basic English and willing to speak some Korean, Native Korean speakers preferred. 

3 Days on Set

Please send your resume to: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com. 

We will email you the audition instructions.

CASTING CALL 

“Way Back Home” Short Film 

Logline: A Korean American mother walks the path of grief while navigating her cultural connection to her father’s roots. Her journey captures how the heavy, isolating weight of parental loss changes us forever. 

Production Title: Way Back Home

Compensation: PAID, Travel and hotel stipend 

Audition Information: Virtual/Selftape 

Shooting Schedule: 

    •    Zoom table read - TBD
    •    Shoot dates Sept 2-6 

Shooting Location: Denver and Fort Collins, Colorado 

Non-Union 

Email: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com

This supporting role is very important to the overall story. Without this character, the lead has no clear direction. With that said, finding an older Korean male can be difficult so no experience is required but there has to be a desire to want to learn and be open-minded! 

Character Breakdown: 

APPA / HARABEOJI (Supporting)
Korean / East Asian
Actor will portray Appa at different stages of his life (40s/50s, 60s-70s):
Taekwondo Master and Dojo owner. Immigrated to the U.S. in the 1970s. A man building a life in a new country. Controlled and guarded, yet with glimpses of warmth beneath the surface and quite charismatic in his joyfulness for life. His physicality and stillness should communicate strength, sacrifice, and quiet determination.
A commanding presence — disciplined, dignified, and physically strong despite walking with a cane. His exterior is firm and authoritative, shaped by hardship and sacrifice, yet he carries a profound gentleness with those he loves and has an infectious smile. His face reflects lived experience: resilience, pride, and unspoken pain.

Must speak basic English and willing to speak some Korean, Native Korean speakers preferred. 

3 Days on Set

Please send your resume to: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com. 

We will email you the audition instructions.
items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Actors, we see you. 💙

The endless self-tapes, radio silence after auditions, and constant anxiety — it’s draining. But the biggest barrier usually isn’t your talent. It’s a system that makes genuine connection harder.

Swipe through → to understand the challenges many actors face and why live auditions (when done right) can be incredibly valuable for you and the project.

At Gratwick, we’re committed to doing better. We champion actors with real support, respect, and meaningful opportunities — including live auditions where your full presence can shine.

Shoutout to our lead Antonio Sabato Jr — thank you for bringing so much heart to this project!

Ready to create with a team that has your back? Drop a 🎥 below or send us a message. We’d love to hear from you.

Tag an actor friend who needs this reminder 👇

#ActorsLife #Acting #LiveAuditions #ActorSupport #FilmProduction #Casting #IndieFilm

items.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel kündigt Monika Medek das 172. KBF an

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 172. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 21.07.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Wert und Wirkung – der Nutzen meiner Kunst 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber

sharedPost.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel kündigt Monika Medek das 172. KBF an

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 172. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 21.07.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

💬 Plaudermeeting: Wert und Wirkung – der Nutzen meiner Kunst 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Welche Wirkung hat meine künstlerische Arbeit auf Publikum, Gesellschaft oder Auftraggeber*innen? Wie lässt sich ihr Wert vermitteln – auch jenseits des Monetären? Und wie kann ich den Nutzen meiner Kunst so kommunizieren, dass er für andere greifbar und nachvollziehbar wird? 

In diesem interaktiven Plaudermeeting tauschen wir Erfahrungen, Perspektiven und praktische Ansätze aus. Gemeinsam erarbeiten wir, wie wir unsere künstlerische Arbeit selbstbewusst nach außen vertreten, unsere Außenwirkung gezielt gestalten und mit einem klaren Verständnis des eigenen Wertes in Gespräche, Projekte und Verhandlungen gehen können. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die ihre künstlerische Position schärfen, sich inspirieren lassen und sich mit Kolleg*innen vernetzen möchten. 

© Alexandr Ivanov 

📲 Mehr Infos: 
Website: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at  
Facebook: https://fb.me/e/9GwVTnc5y 
 

#Kultur #Kunst #Künstlerinnen #Kreativität #Kunstschaffen #BusinessFrühstück #Selbstmarketing #Kulturmanagement #Netzwerken #Wien #Innovation

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 29/2026

CHRISTOPHER NOLANS KINO RÜCKKEHR UND DIE KAULITZ BRÜDER.

Der Starregisseur ist nach 3jähriger Abstinenz zurück und nahm sich der antiken Story von Homer an. Ob die bildgewaltige DIE ODYSSEE mit ihrem Starensemble der Meilenstein des heurigen Kinosommers ist, erfahren Sie in unserer Sendung.

Wetten dass ? Bill & Tom Kaulitz auch als Synchronsprecher etwas haben. Im Startalk zu Minions & Monster geben die beiden einen kleinen Einblick in diese Arbeit.

Auch der österreichische Film hat in dieser Sendung seinen Platz. Im Gespräch mit Sarah Fuchs erzählt Samira Fux über ihren Film PILIJI.

In Punkto Musik knallen wir wieder die besten Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre übern Äther.

Mittwoch 15.7.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
🎬 SCRIPTWRITERS WANTED LENICO PRODUCTIONS ✍️
I’m currently developing a zero budget independent film based in Liverpool and I’m looking for passionate scriptwriters who want to collaborate and help bring an original story to life.

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain experience, and be part of an ambitious independent production from the ground up.

What you’ll gain from being involved:

✍️ Official writing credit on the final production

🎬 See your ideas developed into a real film project

📁 Build your writing portfolio and screenplay experience

🤝 Collaborate with actors, directors and other creatives

🌟 Gain valuable experience within an independent film production

📽️ Potential opportunities to work on future Lenico Productions projects

🎭 Have your storytelling showcased on screen

I’m looking for writers interested in:

🎭 Crime

🎬 Drama

⚡ Thriller

🧟 Horror

😂 Comedy

📺 TV & Film

Whether you’re experienced or just starting out, if you’ve got ideas and enjoy storytelling, I’d love to hear from you.

📧 Email: cheethamlennie55@gmail.com

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy, or you know someone who might be interested, please get in touch or share this post.

🎥 Let’s create something together.

#Scriptwriter #Screenwriter #Liverpool #IndependentFilm #ZeroBudgetFilm #Filmmaking #Screenplay #WritersWanted #LenicoProductions

🎭 PERFORMING OPPORTUNITY – CASTING FOR 2026 🎭
✨ MPP Character Entertainment is now casting performers for 2026! ✨

We have an exciting year ahead filled with magical parties, immersive events and fairytale experiences! We are looking for talented performers to join our growing team!

📍 Location: Manchester & North West, UK

⸻

🌟 About the Role:

• Most events are based in Manchester and across the North West, so local performers are strongly preferred

• 🚗 A full driving licence and access to a car is required (petrol costs covered)

• 👑 Casting for a range of characters, you may be suited to multiple roles

• 🎭 A background in musical theatre, acting or performance is ideal

• 💖 We’re looking for performers who are bubbly, kind, reliable and confident working with children

We offer flexible opportunities including temporary work, short-term contracts, weekly bookings, and cover shifts, perfect whether you want regular work or occasional gigs ✨

⸻

📩 How to Apply:

Please send your CV and a recent headshot to:

📧Manager@MPPCharacterEntertainment.com

Or drop us a private message to register your interest 💌

🌐 Website: www.manchesterprincessparties.co.uk

We can’t wait to welcome new performers and create even more magical moments in 2026! ✨

MPP Character Entertainment

items.text:
**************THIS CASTING IS NOW CLOSED********************

THANKYOU SO MUCH TO EVERYONE THAT APPLIED, LIKED, SUPPORTED AND COMMENTED ON THIS POST. SUCH AN AMAZING COMMUNITY!!!!

*******************************************************************

CASTING NOTICE - LEAD ACTRESS – PAID

TENTH MAN FILMS is seeking to film an Independent Feature Film – Funding Teaser Trailer.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17"

An ambitious independent feature film is seeking an exceptional lead actress for a professionally produced teaser trailer to support feature film financing.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17" is a contained horror thriller with political suspense, blending the claustrophobic tension of "Buried" with the global stakes of "Contagion" and the relentless urgency of "24".

When a catastrophic zombie outbreak traps an international diplomat inside Room 17 of a failing hotel, she must stop the world descending into nuclear war using nothing but her intelligence, determination and a rapidly dying mobile phone—all without ever leaving the room.

The Role
This is a performance-led role for an actress capable of carrying the screen almost entirely through visual storytelling.
The teaser contains no dialogue, requiring subtle, truthful and emotionally engaging performance through expression, physicality and screen presence alone. The character is intelligent, composed and resourceful, but as events unfold she is pushed to her emotional and physical limits.

This is an exciting opportunity to become the face of a feature film currently entering the finance stage, with the intention of attaching cast and moving into full production following successful funding.

Casting Brief:
Female
Playing age: 35–55

items.text:
21.07 Warszawa i okolice

Dzień dobry, na WTOREK 21.07.2026 szukam mężczyzny oraz kobiety w wieku ok. 55-65 lat do odegrania głównych ról w teledysku muzycznym. 

Oczekiwania to dyspozycyjność 12h na planie zdjęciowym, oraz podstawowe lub średnio zaawansowane umiejętności aktorskie. Ważnym aspektem scenariusza jest autentyczność i bycie naturalnym i takie też scenki rodzajowe będą do odegrania. Będzie też potrzeba nauczenia się kilku krótkich tekstów "śpiewano-rapowanych". 
Zlecenie jest oczywiście płatne. W komentarzach proszę o zgłoszenia (profile otwarte + instagram) zastrzegam sobie prawo wybrania i odpisania wybranym osobom.

Miejsce planu zdjęciowego to Radzymin. 

Pozdrawiam

**CASTING CALL | Social-Media-Clip | Stuttgart | 19.07.2026**

Für die Produktion eines **Social-Media-Clips für eine aufstrebende Streetwear-Marke** suchen wir noch drei Darstellerfür einen Drehtag in **Stuttgart**.

**Gesucht werden**

**Arzt**
* männlich
* ca. 50–70 Jahre

**Empfangsmitarbeiterin**
* weiblich
* ca. 30–50 Jahre

**Patient / Patientin im Wartezimmer**
* ca. 50–80 Jahre
* gerne mit markantem oder besonderem Look
* ein eigener Hund ist ein Plus, aber kein Muss

**Dreh:** 19.07.2026
**Ort:** Stuttgart
**Drehdauer:** je nach Rolle ca. 1–3 Stunden
**Vergütung:** Gage, individuell je nach Rolle

Schauspielerische Erfahrung ist von Vorteil, aber keine Voraussetzung. Uns sind vor allem authentische Persönlichkeiten mit einer natürlichen Ausstrahlung wichtig.

Bei Interesse schickt uns bitte eine E-Mail an **[sven@versusarchive.com](mailto:sven@versusarchive.com)** mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Alter
* Wohnort
* ggf. kurzer Vita oder schauspielerischer Erfahrung

Falls ihr euch in den genannten Rollen nicht wiederfindet, aber trotzdem Lust habt, Teil des Projekts zu sein, schreibt uns gerne trotzdem. Wir sind auf der Suche nach interessanten Gesichtern und authentischen Persönlichkeiten für eine Szene im Wartezimmer.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

items.text:
Paid film extras
Tinker Taylor TV are looking for 8 extras aged 18+  to appear in a professional film being shot at Uttoxeter Racecourse.

Date: Tuesday 21st July

Time: 2:30pm–9:30pm

Fee: Fixed payment of £110 per person. 

This is an all-inclusive fee and no additional expenses are payable - actors/extras local to Uttoxeter are best suited for these roles. 

No previous acting experience is necessary and there are no scripted lines.

The role involves appearing as a member of the public in two filmed scenes:

- Walking through or sitting within a mock train station concourse.

- Taking part in a lively crowd scene, where some cheering, shouting and general crowd reactions will be required.

Although you’ll be on set from 2:30pm–9:30pm, there will be a substantial break during filming, with approximately three hours of on-camera work in total. 

Refreshments and a meal will be provided.

All selected extras will be subject to a police background check before filming and will be asked to provide the necessary information to enable this to be carried out.

It will be a fun shoot, with a highly experienced and talented crew, working alongside professional actors. 

We would love to hear from you!  Please note mine are not the contact details for casting, just for further info! Interested parties should send an email along with a headshot to:  abbie@tinkertaylor.tv 

Thanks very much for your help!

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES LOCAL HIRE

We are currently casting the lead roles of **Cris** and **Rosa** for *Pregnant by a Demon*, a 30-minute scripted mockumentary comedy pilot shooting in Los Angeles.

**CRIS — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 18–21. Must be 18+ and able to believably portray 16. Cris is sharp, beautiful, restless, and dryly funny. She dreams of becoming more independent and escaping the chaos of her family, but beneath the sarcasm, eye rolls, and teenage defiance, she feels everything deeply. She is caught between two worlds, two languages, and two versions of herself. The role includes one brief kiss with the character of Mike.
**Works 4 days | Rate: $1,500 total**

**ROSA — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 45–65. Must be able to portray an older family matriarch through styling. Rosa is the family’s sweet-faced, sharp-tongued matriarch—warm and loving one moment, terrifying with a candle and a curse the next. She believes she is spiritually gifted, deeply misunderstood, and absolutely right about everything. Dramatic, nosy, loving, superstitious, and impossible to ignore, Rosa uses guilt, prayer, black magic, and perfectly timed insults to keep her family in line.
**Works approximately 3.5 days | Rate: $1,000 flat**

**Shoot dates:** July 20–25, 2026
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA vicinity
**Local hire only**
**Rates are all-inclusive and firm**

**This project is non-union**
**Submission deadline:** July 13, 2026

Please email your **headshot, résumé, and reel** to **sheela@reigncasting.com** with the role name in the subject line.

Please **only** submit if you fit the role requirements.

Please only submit for Cris if you truly look like you can pass for high school. Submissions that do not match the requested criteria will be deleted.

items.text:
**** PAID CASTING NOTICE ****

Towers Film LV Productions is seeking a talented actress for its upcoming indie feature film.

Title: Towers

Tagline: Love is the signal that crosses every dimension

Synopsis: After their mother mysteriously disappears, two teenage sisters embark on an unforgettable journey that leads them to an ancient alien secret hidden beneath the Nevada desert.

Shoot Dates: August 1-2, 2026

Location: Las Vegas, NV

Shoot Length: 1.5 days

Rate: $200 flat

Union Status: Non-Union

ROLE:

PETRA 16yr (Supporting)

Female, 18-24 max age. Think Dustin from Stranger Things - super smart, funny, and witty. Comedic chops a must. Ethnicity: Asian, Pacific Islander or mixed heritage. 

Talent must be willing to work as a Las Vegas local hire. No travel or housing will be provided.

TO SUBMIT

Please send the following to: towerslvfilm@gmail.com

* Headshot

* Resume

* Acting reel or performance clips (required)

Selected applicants will be invited to submit a video audition.

* Acting reel or performance clips (required)

Selected applicants will be invited to submit a video audition.

items.text:
Hi everyone! My name is Matthew Fernandez, and I'm a professional actor based in Houston, Texas.
I'm always looking to connect with filmmakers, casting directors, producers, and fellow creatives working on feature films, short films, student films, commercials, and other exciting projects.
I'm proudly represented by Condra Artista talent agency and am committed to continuing to grow as an actor, expand my body of work, and collaborate with passionate storytellers. While I'm based in Houston, I'm happy to travel for the right opportunity.
Attached are a few of my headshots, and I've included a link to my acting reel on YouTube below.
If you have any current or upcoming casting opportunities that you think l would be a good fit for, l would love to connect! Feel free to comment below or send me a direct message.
Thank you, and I look forward to connecting with y'all!

I have an athletic build, 5’11, 175Ibs

Demo reel: https://youtu.be/msd-c8sNhZ0?is=lwKH-mOhm8qbn81n

Instagram: @mfs_films

items.text:
TABLE-READ PARTICIPANTS NEEDED! (Volunteer/Non-Paid)

Hi all! I am fairly new to this group, but not new to the writing world.

I have written a Christian faith-based screenplay and am seeking 4 strong actors to participate in an upcoming table read. Because this is a small group, actors must be confident readers capable of covering multiple roles/voices.

Breakdown:
2 Males (Age 30+)
2 Females (Age 30+)

Logistics:
Date: Tuesday, July 21 or Thursday, July 23 (Exact date TBD based on cast availability)

Time: 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM

Location: Spring/Tomball area - Near Grand Parkway and Kuykendahl (Exact public location TBD)

Perks: Appetizers or light meal will be provided!

Please inbox me with your interest and a brief note about your reading/acting experience. Looking forward to connecting!

items.text:
Seeking Actors & Singers! Please review the roles below for auditions before submitting, ONLY serious actors and dependable wanted that can attend scheduled rehearsals. If not Do Not Submit. Please submit headshot, role in subject line, resume or demo to 
Email Submissions: Taraentertainmentllc@gmail.com 

Deadline July 29th. No Exceptions! 

Tiffany, Michelle's Eldest Daughter
Female35-40 y.o.
African-American
The eldest daughter of Michelle & George. Driven, organized, emotionally guarded. She's carried the family's weight for years and believes Christmas is the key to healing. Also hoping to repair the relationship with her sister, Susan, which has been broken for years. Must be able to sing for this role. 

Kevin, Susan's Husband
Male32-38 y.o.
African-American Latino / Hispanic White / Caucasian Other Middle Eastern Native American Pacific Islander
Steady, gentle, and devoted. He loves Susan with a patient, deliberate love that heals every wound her family left behind. He has a warmth that disarms even the most guarded Carter.

Henry
Male25-30 y.o.
All ethnicities
Sophisticated, warm, clearly more than just a friend. Also, a little shy until he warms up to people. Must be comfortable playing a gay role.

Anita, Brandon's Girlfriend 
Female24-28 y.o.
All ethnicities
Sassy, sweet, fully aware of Brandon's nonsense. However, she will check him when she provoked. 

Sasha, Brandon's Baby Mama
Female22-26 y.o.
All ethnicities
Loud, dramatic, not above showing up uninvited.

Freda
Female27-34 y.o.
African-American
Darlene's daughter. Messier than her mother. A gossip, sarcastic, and instigates drama.

Paid Gig.

🎬 THE SPOTLIGHT IS BACK ON NYC! 🎬
The screen is descending and the red carpet is being rolled out in the heart of the city. Get ready—the 3rd Annual AMT International Film Festival is officially taking over New York City this October!
We are looking for the most bold, original, and boundary-pushing voices in cinema. Is your masterpiece ready for the big screen?

✨ CALL FOR SUBMISSIONS ✨
 REGULAR DEADLINE ENDS JULY 24

 🎬 Feature Films & Short Films
 🎥 Documentaries
 ✍️ Screenplays
 🤖 AI-Generated Works
 🎨 Animation
 🧸 Children’s Films
 
  FILMFREEWAY  #filmfestival #indiefilm #films #amttheater #art

items.text:
# 🎬 CASTING CALL | *GREEN ROOM*

**"Is holding onto someone worth losing yourself?"**

In 2005, two teenage best friends discover a mysterious hidden room inside their high school that reveals visions of their futures, forcing one of them to choose between loyalty and the life he truly wants.

We're currently casting for our upcoming Vancouver Film School short film, **Green Room**, and are looking for passionate performers to join the project! We welcome both experienced actors and those who are just starting out.

If you're interested, please send your **headshot, self-tape, resume (if available), and demo reel (if available)** to:

**📧 ****[greenroomshortfilm@gmail.com](mailto:greenroomshortfilm@gmail.com)**

Due to our production schedule, **we will be casting directly from self-tapes.** We will **not** be holding in-person callbacks or a second round of auditions, as we are working with a very quick turnaround.

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!
## Production Information

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Shoot Dates:** July 30, July 31 & August 1, 2026
**Production:** Vancouver Film School
**Genre:** Coming-of-Age / Supernatural Drama
**Union Status:** Strictly Non - Union performers
**Compensation:** Volunteer / Non-paid. IMDb credit, demo reel footage, meals/craft services, and a **$10/day lunch stipend** will be provided.
## Roles
**ORRIN** *(Lead)*

**Male | Asian | Playing Age 18 - 25**

Orrin is charismatic, funny, impulsive, and impossible to ignore. He uses humor and reckless behavior to hide how deeply insecure he feels about himself and his future. Unlike Malik, Orrin has already convinced himself that he will never escape his hometown or become anything more than what he grew up around. He masks his fear with jokes, but underneath that energy is someone terrified of being abandoned and left behind by the one person who truly understands him—Malik. Orrin depends heavily on their friendship, even if he would never openly admit it. He is energetic, emotionally reactive, and constantly searching for distraction so he doesn't have to confront his own hopelessness. Despite his flaws, he is deeply lovable and genuinely cares about Malik.

**MR. BLOCK** *(Supporting)*

**Male | Any Ethnicity | Playing Age 35+**

The principal of Lawson High School. Strict, blunt, and tired of dealing with students who waste their potential. While he comes across as intimidating and frustrated, there is genuine concern underneath his authority.
## Audition Process

**🎥 Self-Tape Deadline:** **July 16, 2026**

Please submit:
* Headshot
* Self-tape
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel (if available)

Casting decisions will be made directly from submitted self-tapes. Due to our production timeline, there will be **no callbacks or second-round auditions**.

We look forward to seeing your submissions!

items.text:
✨ **Home educating a neurodivergent or SEND child?**

🌱 **We're offering *****Life Skills***** classes designed to support how they learn best, and we have spaces for September! **
**Available for ages 6-12 & 13-16.**

These friendly online group sessions help children and young people to:
🧠 Understand emotions & self-awareness
🗣️ Communicate clearly and confidently
🤝 Build social skills
🌟 Grow independence & self-esteem

We work with lots of neurodivergent learners (including autism, ADHD, PDA, anxiety and more), and our approach is gentle, kind, and adaptable to each child's needs.

***Not sure if online learning will work for your child?*** 🤔 
We have a trial available on our Open Week in August! ☀️ 
*Only £3.60 and no commitment!*

Let me know if you'd like to try it out! 😊
~ Aimee, Swan Tutoring

SHARE! SHARE!SHARE! 

NOW CASTING: Mother & Daughter Duos for a Claire's Ad Campaign

Do you have a teenage daughter between the ages of 7-10 who has never had her ears pierced?

We're looking for Los Angeles-area mother/daughter duos to participate in an upcoming ad campaign for Claire's.

Requirements:

Daughter must be between 13–16 years old

Daughter has never had her ears pierced

Must be willing to have her ears pierced as part of the campaign

Must be located in the Los Angeles area

Compensation:

$600 for Mom

$600 for Daughter

If your shoot is selected for social media use, you will each receive an additional $2,500

To Apply:

Please record a short selfie video featuring both of you telling us:

Who you are

Why you'd like this opportunity

Why getting your ears pierced is meaningful or exciting to you

Please include:

Names

Ages

Phone number(s)

We can't wait to meet you!

Email your video to: Jacqui@pitmancastingprojects.com

Everyone In LA

items.text:
# WROCŁAW I OKOLICE
# 

Zaczynamy produkcję nowego sezonu **Trudnych Spaw** w Polot Media co oznacza, że szukamy nowych aktorów! Proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

Zgłoszenia dla osób z **WROCŁAWIA LUB WOJEWÓDZTWA DOLNOŚLĄSKIEGO**:

**Artur Lewandowski (wiek kandydata: 31-36 l.**) **– podwładny bohaterki **

3 sceny: 21.07.2026

Atrakcyjny mężczyzna z kreatywną fryzurą. Do pracy nosi białą koszulę. Barman w restauracji. Żonaty. Rozcieńcza alkohol w pracy, przez co pozostaje w ciągłym

konflikcie z główną bohaterką.

**Wiktoria Porowska (wiek kandydatki: 23-27 l.) – oszustka **

5 scen: 21-22.07.2026

Niska, szczupła szatynka. Ubiera się skromnie i nie rzuca się w oczy. Brak cech szczególnych. Kłamliwa, chłodna, bezwzględna. Bez skrupułów oszukuje, by wyłudzić i przywłaszczyć pieniądze.

**Janusz Michalski (wiek kandydata 29-34 l.) - informatyk w firmie transportowej, kolega głównej bohaterki**

11 scen: od 21 do 23.07.2026

Powyżej 175 cm, szczupły, energiczny. Nosi nieformalną fryzurę: kucyk lub włosy do ramion.

Zakochany w głównej bohaterce. Ironiczny, z zewnątrz może sprawiać wrażenie osoby niepoważnej. W scenariuszu występuje scena pocałunku z główną bohaterką!

**Przedstawiciel firmy Cargo (40 lat)**

2 sceny 23.07 od 17:30

Wygląd dowolny.

**Pan Zbigniew Wolański (52 lata) – były kierownik magazynu**

1 scena 23.07 od 15:30

Wygląd dowolny.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule "Trudne Sprawy + IMIĘ postaci" wraz z:
* **aktualnymi** zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki, 
* wiekiem, 
* wzrostem i wagą, 
* numerem telefonu, 
* materiałami video z odcinków, w których występowałeś/aś (jeżeli grałeś/aś w przeszłości)

na maila julia.lisowiec@polotmedia.pl.

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach, w podanym przedziale wiekowym oraz pochodzącym z odpowiedniej lokalizacji.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '南 TRUDNE SPRAWY SPR'

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**20-21-22-25 lipca**

**Stawki: 140 – 280 zł gotówką po planie**

** **

Zapraszam na plany nowego serialu dla jednej z telewizji. Jesteśmy w temacie futbolu. I daleko od fair play ;).

Tym razem gramy sekwencje stadionowe przez kilka dni na stadionie w Ząbkach. Zapewniamy transport z Warszawy.

 

Kogo szukam?

 

**- KIBICE –** tzw. pikniki czyli wszyscy od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 60 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**

**- ULTRASI – **kobiety i mężczyźni od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 50 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**. Spośród tej grupy reżyser będzie wybierał młodych mężczyzn do kontynuacji i do epizodów. **Stawka dla osób z kontynuacją 180 zł. Dla epizodów 250 zł.**

**- GNIAZDOWY / BĘBNIARZE –** z prawdziwego zdarzenia. Tu trzeba wiedzieć co robić. **Stawka 280 zł gotówką.**

** **

Do przydzielenia będą również role POLICJANTÓW Z PREWENCJI i PORZĄDKOWYCH.  **Stawka 140 zł gotówką.**

 

Zgłaszać można się na 1 dzień lub wszystkie 4 dni.

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS + wybrany dzień / dni**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **aktualne** **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie najlepiej) i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'DODI TYTUŁEM agencja agenajacastingowg ja astingow CASTING CASTING/STATYŚCI STATYŚCI SZUKAMY STATYSTÓW SERIAL FABULARNY KOGO SZUKAMY ? Kobiety mężczyźni 16-60 lat ZGŁOSZENIA NA MAIL: ewelina.wika@podtytutem.pl DUŻO POSTACI DO OBSADZENIA Kibice, mieszkańcy, policjanci wiele innych w ZAŁĄCZENIU PROSIMY 0: •imię nazwisko numer telefonu •miejscowość wzrost zdjęcie twarzy sylwetki SZCZEGÓŁY DOTYCZĄCE ZGŁOSZENIA w TREŚCI POSTA'

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI MŁODZI STATYŚCI (11-14 lat)
Jesteśmy studentami Warszawskiej Szkoły Filmowej i w dniach 20–22 lipca (poniedziałek – środa) będziemy realizować zdjęcia do naszego filmu dyplomowego. Nagrania odbędą się w przestrzeni Szkoły Podstawowej na warszawskiej Pradze.

Poszukujemy wielu młodych statystów (dzieci i młodzieży w wieku ok. 11-14 lat) Tematyka jest niezwykle ważna społecznie, historia opowiada o dziewczynce w spektrum autyzmu, która szuka akceptacji wśród rówieśników.

Informacje organizacyjne dla rodziców:

Termin: 20–22 lipca (poniedziałek – środa) – wakacje, więc to idealny czas na kreatywną przygodę.

Miejsce: Szkoła Podstawowa Warszawa (Praga).

Bezpieczeństwo: Na planie zapewniamy pełne bezpieczeństwo – dzieci przez cały czas będą pod opieką opiekuna. Gwarantujemy też świetną, wspierającą atmosferę.

Jeśli Wasze dziecko chciałoby wziąć udział w nagraniach (w wybrane dni lub w całym terminie), prosimy o bezpośredni kontakt z pionem produkcji filmu: mail - annabuczkowskaprod@gmail.com. 

Z góry bardzo dziękuję za pomoc i wsparcie młodego kina!

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of child and text

items.text:
‼️🎬🎞️📽️ CASTING STACJONARNY ‼️
Mamy dla Was nową wspaniałą produkcję filmową, kostiumową.

🗓️ DATA 17.07 

🕒 Jesteśmy w godzinach od 11:00-19:00

📍Warszawa, WFDiF

CHEŁMSKA 21 bud 1 pokój 5 

Odświeżysz zdjęcia, zapiszesz się do cyfrowej bazy. Otworzysz drzwi na naszą współpracę.

Zapraszamy wszystkich zainteresowanych!

To będzie wspaniała przygoda.

Nagrania ruszają od sierpnia.

items.text:
Hiya everyone! 

I am a young actor looking to re-enter the industry after doing lots of professional work some years ago. I’d love to participate in short films to create content for my showreel. Please contact me with casting calls on Ben.jbarker@outlook.com or my mobile at 07584956796. 

thanks!

topComments.text: If you were a young performer with an agent, you would know that you need to show your CV with your training, previous roles with the name of the production company & director. You would also know that in the UK you would need at the very least to have a Spotlight entry. Give an accurate history & people will try to help you with furthering your ambitions as an actor. Even unpaid student films are very competitive requiring  applicants to have an agent & Spotlight entry with professional headshots & credits.

items.text:
Fun Costume Character work available at 2 Family Friendly Festivals!

(Exact working hours within the live hours stated below are TBC)

Festival 1: Dorset

Dates: 30th July - 2nd August

Live Hours: 30th July (12:00pm-8:30pm)

31st July - 2nd August (8:30am - 8:30pm)

 

Festival 2: Cheshire

Dates: 7th - 9th August

Live Hours: 7th August (11:30pm-9:00pm)

8th - 9th August (11:00am - 9:00pm)

Pay: £18.49 p/h + travel contribution (accommodation options can be discussed if required)

 

Costume character requirements:

Height: 5ft 8 - 5ft 10

Shoe size - no bigger than a UK 8

Waist: 27.5 inches or less

Bust: 33 inches or less

 

If you fit the above measurements, please get in touch and let us know if you can work either or BOTH of the festivals - staffing@thestaffroomuk.com.

sharedPost.text:
We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel :info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
SINGING LESSONS  -
VOICE PROJECTIONS LESSONS

I’m a professional vocal coach based in Cambridge, with a conservatoire background and many years of experience as a trained opera singer. I’ve had the opportunity to work with international performers and bring that same level of coaching to my students locally and online.

I offer private singing lessons for both children and adults, either face to face or online.

For children and teens, lessons focus on:

• Building confidence and enjoying singing

• Improving vocal range and control

• Learning proper breathing and projection

• Preparing for auditions or ABRSM exams

For adults, I also offer voice coaching for:

• Singing development

• Public speaking and presentations

• Improving clarity and projection

I work with all levels, from complete beginners to more experienced singers, and tailor each lesson to the individual.

If you’d like to see examples of my work, there are videos and more information on my website below.

Happy to answer any questions or have a quick chat to see if it’s a good fit.

📍 Cambridge (also online available)

📞 07854 924209

📧 sebarotti@yahoo.com.ar

🌐 sebastianembrel.co.uk

items.text:
**Casting Call for a Permanent Main Role Role:**

Evangaline the Black Mage--Main Character Role-long term, Permanently Position.

Pay Rate:

I can offer £15 per hour starting from the first hour when we start filming and ending on the last hour when we have stop filming. Overtime payment is included.

Acting Description:

You'll be following my instructions during each Scene/Take as we film. Showing Body Language, Facial Expressions, and Fighting in a RPG gameplay style. You must have a good memory when saying your lines.

Filming Location(s): 

All over the City of Milton Keynes.

Sometimes outside of Milton Keynes if I can not find a good filming location within the area. And most times film locations need to be specific in the right film set.

How many days of Filming:

Minimal of 1 day per month. I try and do multiple days per month but it get's hard to arrange and organize a Film Date based around everyone's rota's.

Travel Payment:

Your Travel fee(s) will be covered by me coming and going from Milton Keynes but you will have to show some proof of your journey so I can give the right amount to cover your Travels.

Food and Drinks:

Food and Drinks will be provided by me, but I don't bring food and drinks since the Team has been ok bringing there own. If we are near a Local Shop, Café, Coffee Shop, or even a Fast Food Restaurant, ect. Just let me know what you like and I will pay for you.

Evangaline Character Description: 

Full Name: Evangaline Springbell

Age: 19

Class: Black Mage-(Elemental Spellcaster)

Weapon(s): Fans and Rods-(Maybe)

Character Appearance:

She wears a big Leather Brown Wizard Hat with a big Red Ribbon to the side of the Belt Buckle, a Neck Choker, and a smooth Summer Red and Black Tartan Dress with a thin small Black Jacket.

She has Black Leggings with Red and Black Socks on and her hair colour changes sometimes to match her emotions.

Her alternative clothes is a Red and Black Hell Bunny Dress. (DLC idea I have used in the past.)

Character Bio:

Evangaline is a skilful Black Mage who uses Black Magic Spells that are a variety of Elemental and Destructive Power.

She is strong-willed, courageous, and has a strong sense of determination to punish those who commit evil deeds on others with her Black Magic. Even if they are her allies and friends which makes her quite scary.

At times she losses' her cool and get's angry sometimes, losing her temper and casting a Fire Magic Spell on others, especially on Zorran who annoys her and sexualised her for being a good looking woman. Making her very fierce and those who cross her will pay with there life.

she is a bit tomboyish, imposing, sharp-tongued, and extremely blunt, always blurting what she truly thinks and feels like without reservation, even if said comments come at others' expense. She makes it a personal philosophy to always be honest as it feels better.

Relationships with other Main Characters:

(Renzu)---She has a very healthy friendship and respect to Renzu the Main Hero of the Story (Protagonist) after he helped her out for being framed for a crime she did not commit without judging her. Evangaline over time starts to development feelings towards him but still treats him like any other typical Boy as they are the same age and that Evangaline has never spent so much time with a Boy before.

(Zorran)---She doesn't like him all that much for being a drunken, lazy, childish, and perverted older man. When Zorran slaps her bum she sets his hand on fire with a fire magic spell which Zorran never learns from. Evangaline has to keep her guard up around him all the time as Zorran is unpredictable.

(Drako)--She feels Drako's pain after he lost his loved one to a Troll Monster, although Drako hasn't been part of the team for that long and she doe's not know him all too well but she enjoys his fighting spirit and resolve and get's along well with him 2nd to Renzu. Evangaline doe's not get why Drako likes Zorran that much or why his calling him "Master". She thinks he is a bit naïve.

What I'm looking for:

A Female Actress who is Capable, Committed, Not in full Education, Fit for the role, Flexible with her Rota, and is able to travel to Milton Keynes. And can travel to other locations outside Milton Keynes.

Age: 18-24

Height: 5.3 foot to 5.8 foot

Skin: White

Hair Colour: Any.

Body Type: Slim Build, Chubby, Athletic

Acting Requirements: Everybody is welcome, show me what you can do and what you know based on your Acting Experience.

Nationality: White British. Other White or British Nationality are welcome within reason.

I'm willing to let 1 or 2 slide if you don't meet the requirements, the rest will come down to a finale decision as I can't make any mistakes as this role is very important to be filled. If you don't think you can do this or can't handle it then best to step down from applying.

How to apply:

You can send a message to me directly. We can talk first, exchange information and contacts maybe, I will answer some questions that you wish to know or what I have missed in this Casting Call but not too many please as it saves time and I want to save my breath in answering questions and providing more info to those who are actually serious about this Post (No time wasters please).

After a few steps I'LL arrange a time and date to meet face to face with you if you live in or near Milton Keynes or by Video Call if you live far away like London. The chat will be about 1 hour and 30 mins.

If you are traveling to meet me in person your Travel Cost will be covered coming to Milton Keynes and going back home, which I will provide a fair sum for the time you have taken to see me on your journey.

Looking to continue filming with are new Actress as Evangaline starting August.

Thank you for taking the time to read this.

sharedPost.text:
ATTN PLAYWRIGHTS: SEEKING NEW PLAY SUBMISSIONS!

True Repertory Theatre is seeking new play submissions for our September production of Playwright's Platform, a weekend of staged readings of new plays. We are proud to produce this festival for the third consecutive year!

INFO:

CONCEPT: Script in hand, staged readings.

LOCATION: The Beal House, 222 Main St., Kingston, MA.

REHEARSALS: September 20, 21, 23

PERFORMANCES: Friday, September 25 & Saturday, September 26 at 8pm & Sunday, September 27 at 3pm

DIRECTORS/ACTORS:  If your script is chosen, a director/actors will be provided.

SUBMISSION DEADLINE: Friday, August 14th 

SUBMISSIONS: Please send your script to: Truerepertorytheatre@gmail.com    Feel free to submit 10 minute plays, one-acts, full length!

Thank you & we look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL

“Way Back Home” Short Film 

Logline: A Korean American mother walks the path of grief while navigating her cultural connection to her father’s roots. Her journey captures how the heavy, isolating weight of parental loss changes us forever. 

Production Title: Way Back Home

Compensation: PAID, Travel and hotel stipend 

Audition Information: Virtual/Selftape 

Shooting Schedule: 

    •    Zoom table read - TBD
    •    Shoot dates Sept 2-6 

Shooting Location: Denver and Fort Collins, Colorado 

Non-Union 

Email: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com

This supporting role is very important to the overall story. Without this character, the lead has no clear direction. With that said, finding an older Korean male can be difficult so no experience is required but there has to be a desire to want to learn and be open-minded! 

Character Breakdown: 

APPA / HARABEOJI (Supporting)
Korean / East Asian
Actor will portray Appa at different stages of his life (40s/50s, 60s-70s):
Taekwondo Master and Dojo owner. Immigrated to the U.S. in the 1970s. A man building a life in a new country. Controlled and guarded, yet with glimpses of warmth beneath the surface and quite charismatic in his joyfulness for life. His physicality and stillness should communicate strength, sacrifice, and quiet determination.
A commanding presence — disciplined, dignified, and physically strong despite walking with a cane. His exterior is firm and authoritative, shaped by hardship and sacrifice, yet he carries a profound gentleness with those he loves and has an infectious smile. His face reflects lived experience: resilience, pride, and unspoken pain.

Must speak basic English and willing to speak some Korean, Native Korean speakers preferred. 

3 Days on Set

Please send your resume to: waybackhomefilmusa@gmail.com. 

We will email you the audition instructions.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - PAID** 

Title: *Olive & Lemon*

Type: Independent Short

Location: Cedar City, Utah

Shoot Dates: September 9 - 15, 2026

Compensation: Day Rate. Meals, credit, Non-union. Travel and Lodging Included.

**To submit:**

Email the following to ojo.verdadero.llc@gmail.com:
* Name and age
* Current location (city/town)
* Recent photo
* Any acting experience 

ROLES:

**DAMON (Child) | Age 9–12**

Damon grows up relying on his older sister, Olivia, to protect him through a difficult home environment. When she leaves to study abroad, he feels abandoned and struggles to cope on his own. Over time, he shuts her out, isolating himself and removing all traces of her.

Requirements:
* Able to take direction
* No acting experience required (experience is a plus)
* Preferably dark hair

Note: A parent or legal guardian must be involved throughout the casting and production process.

**DAMON (Adult) | Age 25–30**

As a child, Damon depended on his older sister, Olivia, for comfort and protection in a troubled home. After she leaves to study abroad, he feels abandoned and gradually distances himself from her. As an adult, he becomes a librarian who prefers solitude, burying himself in books to avoid confronting his past. Following Olivia's sudden death, he is forced to face years of regret and unresolved grief. Through honoring her memory, he begins the difficult journey toward forgiveness and healing.

Requirements:
* Able to take direction
* No acting experience required (experience is a plus)
* Preferably dark hair

**MOM | 40s**

A mother who is emotionally distant and unable to provide the support her children need. Her presence creates a tense home environment, leaving a lasting impact on both of her children.

Requirements:
* Able to take direction
* No acting experience required (experience is a plus)
* Preferably dark hair and colored eyes

Hi everyone,

I’m Leah, a 23-year-old actress based in Surrey, UK. I have a background in drama, musical theatre and live performance, and I’m currently looking for opportunities in film, TV, commercials, music videos and short films.

I’m also currently receiving voice acting coaching with Jewel Studios and continuing to develop my skills in the field.

I’m happy to travel and relocate for the right role.

About me:
• Surrey-based
• Theatre and stage performance experience
• Singer with strong harmony skills
• Currently training in voice acting with Jewel Studios
• BA (Hons) Criminology graduate
• Reliable, professional and enthusiastic

My headshot is attached, and I’d love to be considered for any suitable roles. Please feel free to get in touch.

Thank you.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL | Irish and Scottish Actors (Unpaid)**

**Feature Film Table Read**
**Wednesday, 19 August | 6:00–9:00 PM UK Time | Remote via Zoom**

Hi! I'm Catryn, an American screenwriter who's spent the last several years developing **Of Mists & Gods**, an epic fantasy inspired by Irish mythology and set in Iron Age Ireland and Scotland.

One thing has always been important to me: **authenticity.**

No amount of research can replace hearing these characters spoken by people who grew up with the rhythms, humour, and music of Irish and Scottish voices. That's why I'm looking specifically for Irish and Scottish actors to help bring this world to life.

This isn't an audition for a finished production. It's an opportunity to collaborate on a screenplay that's actively moving through competitions, fellowships, producer meetings, and continued development. My goal is to hear the story through authentic performances, gather feedback, and create select audio clips that help introduce audiences to the world of *Of Mists & Gods*.

**What I'm Looking For**

The carousel includes lead, supporting, and additional speaking roles for:
* Irish actors
* Scottish actors
* Adults and one child (male)
* Experienced professionals and emerging performers alike

**Interested?**

Please **swipe through the character cards** and comment on the role (or roles) that interest you. If possible, include a link to your Spotlight profile, IMDb, demo reel, website, or another sample of your work.

**About the Story**

When her uncontrolled magic leads to the death of her young nephew, an aspiring druid flees across the sea hoping to rid herself of the very gift she's always dreamed of possessing. But as her grief-stricken sister rises among rival warriors, Niamh must learn to embrace her power or risk losing her new family.

I'd love to find actors who are excited by rich characters, mythology, and the chance to help shape a story from the ground up.

topComments.text: Just a word of warning to folk interested in this. Beware of people wanting your material to use for training AI. Given this is unpaid and a remote “table read”. Be cautious, demand a contract that states will not be used to train AI.
I'd love to bit sadly I'm not Irish or Scottish. I hope.you manage to get all the people you need and they work out really perfectly.  Good luck

items.text:
CASTING CALL – PERFORMERS & PERSONALITIES
Music Video: "STRUT" by BEACHTITZ

Location: City Centre Motor Hotel – Vancouver, BC�Shoot Date: Monday, July 20�Time: Approximately 10:00 PM – 12:00 AM�Compensation: Unpaid (Professional Footage + Credit)

We're transforming a retro Vancouver motel into a bold, neon-soaked underground spectacle for the final scene of "STRUT."

This isn't a traditional party scene—it's a celebration of individuality, confidence, and people who own every room they walk into. Think rebellious glamour, underground nightlife, and unforgettable personalities.

We're casting:

* Drag queens

* Fire performers*

* Circus performers

* Stilt walkers

* Flow artists (LED, poi, hoops, fans, etc.)

* Burlesque performers

* Dancers (all styles)

* Roller skaters

* Alternative models

* Tattoo artists, musicians, and creatives with standout style

* Fashion-forward personalities

* Anyone with an unforgettable look and commanding presence

No acting experience is necessary. We're looking for people who are expressive, comfortable on camera, and excited to help create a visually iconic scene.

Wardrobe Inspiration

Think bold, glamorous, expressive, rebellious, high fashion, leather, sequins, latex, vintage, punk, queer nightlife, festival couture, or anything that makes you feel unstoppable. This is your chance to show up as your most confident self.

What You'll Receive

* Professional footage for your reel or social media

* Credit in the official music video

* The opportunity to collaborate with an incredible community of local artists

To Apply

Please send:

* 2–3 recent photos

* Your Instagram

* A brief description of what you do

* Performance photos or videos (if applicable)

DM myself or @BEACHTITZ

Or email breaschneidertalent@gmail.com with the subject line:

"STRUT – MOTEL TAKEOVER"

Let's build a scene that feels like Vancouver's wildest underground night never ended.

*Fire performers must be experienced professionals with their own safety equipment. Any fire performance will be subject to location approval, safety protocols, and production requirements.

items.text:
# PAID CASTING - HUMAN PINBALL SCENE-DEVELOPMENT LAB

**Location:** Vancouver, BC
**Compensation:** $25 CAD per hour (minimum three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop)
**Union Status:** Nonunion

Casting Vancouver-based performers for an initial paid scene-development lab for **Human Pinball**, an original one-hour dark-comedy television series.

The series follows Ren, a trans man revisiting a chaotic period of his life involving dating, identity, police encounters, addiction and sobriety, failed ambition, and the enormous gap between how events felt at the time and how he understands them now.

This is **not** currently a full stage production or a theatrical adaptation of the complete pilot. Initial paid rehearsals will explore selected scenes from the series, with an emphasis on discovering character chemistry, comic rhythm, emotional truth, and which performers make the material impossible to ignore.

The work may incorporate minimal staging, voiceover, projected material, and fast transitions between past and present.

Strong performers and combinations may be invited into future paid workshops or public performances, but no larger production, ongoing company role, or filmed proof of concept is currently guaranteed.

## Roles
PAST REN - Lead

**Playing age:** Late 20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Trans man
**Ethnicity:** Open

Ren before medical and social transition. He is impulsive, sincere, defensive, resourceful, romantically overconfident, emotionally chaotic, and unintentionally funny.

Past Ren must be played as the same boy and man we meet later in the timeline - not as a lesbian, a woman performing masculinity, or someone consciously trying to appear masculine. He is already completely Ren internally, even though the people around him perceive him differently.

The role requires grounded comic instincts, emotional vulnerability, romantic confidence, and the ability to make Ren's wildly optimistic interpretations feel completely sincere.

Performers of all gender identities are welcome to submit if they are comfortable portraying the character on these terms.

JUNE - Supporting

**Playing age:** Mid-20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Woman
**Ethnicity:** Open

Confident, socially fluid, attractive without performing for attention, and difficult for Ren to read accurately.

The role requires understated comic timing, natural presence, and the ability to create believable romantic and sexual tension through genuine connection rather than heightened performance.

ELISE - Supporting

**Playing age:** Mid-20s to early 30s
**Gender:** Woman
**Ethnicity:** Open

Direct, charismatic, emotionally intelligent, and comfortable challenging Ren's assumptions.

Requires grounded flirtation, strong chemistry, quick comic instincts, and ease with emotionally charged dialogue.

## Compensation & Schedule

**Rate:** $25 CAD per hour

**Minimum:** Three paid hours per scheduled rehearsal or workshop

**Location:** Vancouver, BC

**Initial Schedule:** Approximately 2–4 paid sessions during July and August 2026, scheduled around cast availability.

Any future rehearsals, workshops, staged presentations, public performances, or additional work will be offered and compensated separately. Continued involvement is not guaranteed.

No travel or accommodation is provided. Applicants must be based in Metro Vancouver or able to work locally.

## Content

No nudity or simulated sex.

The material includes mature language and references to dating, sexuality, alcohol, drug use, addiction, police restraint and arrest, gender dysphoria, death, financial distress, and emotionally vulnerable autobiographical experiences.

Specific scene content and physical requirements will be disclosed before rehearsals or auditions. Performer boundaries and consent will be respected throughout the process.

## How to Submit

Please reply directly to this post or email info@crowdcue.ca

Include:
* Your name
* The role you'd like to be considered for
* Your location
* Acting résumé or brief experience summary
* Headshot or recent photo
* A link to an existing reel, self-tape, scene, or other performance footage
* Your general availability during July and August 2026

A custom audition tape is **not** required for the initial submission. Shortlisted performers will receive a brief audition scene and character context for the next stage.

Please use the subject line:

**HUMAN PINBALL CASTING - [ROLE]**

items.text:
Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel :info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
A Conversation initiated by TheWorkbook and Center Stage Magazine about the Future of Voice....

 

Use this link to read the June/July Edition of Center Stage Magazine https://publications.castingworkbook.com/center-stage-june-2026-u32t4yfpma/full-view.html

 

 

There has never been a more important time to talk about the human voice and the person behind it.

In our current June/July edition of Center Stage by TheWorkbook, we sat down with Tim Friedlander, Tanya Buchanan, Simon Kennedy, and Memo Sauceda, the Presidents of the Voice Actor Associations in the United States, Canada, Australia, and LATAM, respectively, along with many others. The conversations kept landing in the same place: audiences want connection, clients want authenticity, and the performers who understand that the voice is the vehicle, not the destination, are the ones building careers that last.

This edition isn’t a panic piece about AI. It’s the opposite. It’s a front-row seat to an industry that is getting clearer about what it values.

Watch the trailer below as Host Trevar Fox introduces his interview with Tim, Tanya, Simon, and Memo and click the link in the comments to read the full edition.

 

https://youtu.be/nFvuG6vXk5U?si=n2QsDtcdp3UPmGUJ

items.title: What does the future of Voice Acting look like? | CAVA, NAVA, LAVA, AAVA chime in | CENTER STAGE
items.summary:
A Conversation initiated by TheWorkbook and Center Stage Magazine about the Future of Voice....

 

Use this link to read the June/July Edition of Center Stage Magazine https://publications.castingworkbook.com/center-stage-june-2026-u32t4yfpma/full-view.html

 

 

There has never been a more important time to talk about the human voice and the person behind it.

In our current June/July edition of Center Stage by TheWorkbook, we sat down with Tim Friedlander, Tanya Buchanan, Simon Kennedy, and Memo Sauceda, the Presidents of the Voice Actor Associations in the United States, Canada, Australia, and LATAM, respectively, along with many others. The conversations kept landing in the same place: audiences want connection, clients want authenticity, and the performers who understand that the voice is the vehicle, not the destination, are the ones building careers that last.

This edition isn’t a panic piece about AI. It’s the opposite. It’s a front-row seat to an industry that is getting clearer about what it values.

Watch the trailer below as Host Trevar Fox introduces his interview with Tim, Tanya, Simon, and Memo and click the link in the comments to read the full edition.

 

https://youtu.be/nFvuG6vXk5U?si=n2QsDtcdp3UPmGUJ

sharedPost.text:
🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

💡 Value Highlight: Learn directly from a DP/Director whose professional rate is $1,500/day 

this 4-session online workshop gives you real film-level expertise at a fraction of that cost!
Price on enquiry.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype
"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name
🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.
🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach).

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill
📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):
Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."
The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"
Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.
Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.
Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call
📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable
🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point
📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew
🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.
Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)
🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape
📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:
Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.
Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.
Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:
Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.
Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux
📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

Final Performance (Day 4):
Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?
This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:
mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com
Let’s create something unforgettable.

items.text:
Hey all you cool cats & kittens!!! Come have some fun in the sun!!! 

CFVA Summer Bash!!!!! Woohooo!!!

Join us for the CFVA Summer Bash, Colorado's can't-miss summer networking event for the production and media arts community! Whether you're behind the camera, in front of it, or making the magic happen behind the scenes, this is your chance to connect with fellow creatives in a fun, relaxed setting. Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!! 

• Sunday, August 2, 2026, 4:00 PM

• The Buntport Theater, Denver, Colorado 

• [https://bit.ly/4gyGys7](https://bit.ly/4gyGys7?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaTlPemlkOXN3WkxKVHd4cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6OaTol4XZ4rCwvvURQbhMX_d9BLstM6AH34hykXpEpYnyGg71WvbCy7R_jGQ_aem_AvAJiHw9laj5e1AQsFRXtA) 

Why Attend?
* IT'S SO FUN 
* Expand Your Network
* Meet filmmakers, producers, directors, editors, writers, actors, crew members, content creators, and industry professionals from across Colorado.
* Discover New Collaborations
* Whether you're looking for your next project, your next client, or your next creative partner, Summer Bash is the perfect place to start the conversation.
* Strengthen the Colorado Artist Community - across the mediums!! Film, television, commercials, industrials, theatre, comedy, music, dance - all are invited!!
* Build meaningful relationships, share ideas, and help grow a stronger, more connected community throughout the state.
* Celebrate the Industry
* Take a break from production schedules and enjoy an afternoon with the people who make Colorado's media industry thrive.

Event Highlights

• Free Admission – Everyone is welcome, but registration is encouraged.

• Food Trucks On Site – Grab dinner or a snack from a selection of local food trucks offering a variety of delicious options for purchase.

• Indoor & Outdoor Venue – Stay cool and comfortable at the unique Buntport Theater. 

• Networking & Community – Make new connections, reconnect with familiar faces, and celebrate Colorado's vibrant production/performing arts industry.

Whether you're a longtime CFVA member, new to the industry, or simply curious about Colorado's creative community, the CFVA Summer Bash is a welcoming opportunity to meet new people, exchange ideas, and build relationships that can lead to future collaborations.

Register today and join us on August 2 for an afternoon of community, conversation, and connection. We can't wait to see you at the Summer Bash!

items.text:
Hello all, 

First off, thank you for your overwhelming support and application for “Miss. Lonelyhearts Memory Light” - I made a post on here for our feature a few weeks ago and received way more engagement than I expected. Because of this community, we have been able to track down the perfect cast for our film and my heart is full. Now I only have one major role left to cast -

Delia - Female, Age 35 - 50 - Kids foster Mom. Appears primarily at the beginning and end of the film. In the finale, she is dressed completely in white, representing the "safe place" Kid eventually chooses over her father. Currently scheduled for August 5th and 7th.

If interested, please send an email to rowanharper386@gmail.com and be sure to attach a headshot and a reel if you have it. Note, we are currently working with deferred pay and I’d be happy to discuss that with you.

Additionally, we are looking for 1-3 child extras (Ages 8-12) for our first shoot day, this Wednesday - July 15th. If you have a child who would be interested, or know someone who does, please send me an email and I’d be happy to answer any questions.

Hope to chat soon,
Rowan

items.text:
STILL NEED 2-3 PARTS FOR "MYSTERY BOXES"
July 25, each part requiring 2-3 hours.

DAD/CUSTOMER 

Male, 30-55 years old

A dad looking to buy gifts for his wife and son in the laziest way possible.

BAD/OMINOUS MAN 

Male 25-60 years old

An ethereal character of vague origins. Imposing, scary.

REPORTER

Female, 20-40 years old

A news reporter on-site describing a situation.

Each role pays $15/hr.

Message me for any details. Looking for brief audition videos which I can provide lines for.

Thank you!

items.text:
🌎 Medellín se prepara para recibir al mundo a través de la danza. 💃🕺

¡Ya están abiertas las inscripciones para el Segundo Festival Internacional de Danza Huellas del Mundo – Medellín 2027!

Del 30 de marzo al 5 de abril de 2027, vive una experiencia inolvidable de intercambio cultural junto a agrupaciones nacionales e internacionales, compartiendo escenarios, tradiciones y la pasión por la danza.

✨ Presentaciones artísticas
✨ Intercambio cultural
✨ Convivencia entre delegaciones
✨ Una experiencia que deja huellas para toda la vida

No pierdas la oportunidad de representar a tu agrupación en uno de los encuentros de danza más importantes de Colombia.

📅 30 de marzo al 5 de abril de 2027
📲 Informes e inscripciones: +57 300 472 0249

items.summary:
🌎 Medellín se prepara para recibir al mundo a través de la danza. 💃🕺

¡Ya están abiertas las inscripciones para el Segundo Festival Internacional de Danza Huellas del Mundo – Medellín 2027!

Del 30 de marzo al 5 de abril de 2027, vive una experiencia inolvidable de intercambio cultural junto a agrupaciones nacionales e internacionales, compartiendo escenarios, tradiciones y la pasión por la danza.

✨ Presentaciones artísticas
✨ Intercambio cultural
✨ Convivencia entre delegaciones
✨ Una experiencia que deja huellas para toda la vida

No pierdas la oportunidad de representar a tu agrupación en uno de los encuentros de danza más importantes de Colombia.

📅 30 de marzo al 5 de abril de 2027
📲 Informes e inscripciones: +57 300 472 0249

¡Inscribe tu delegación y deja tus huellas en Medellín con el Festival Internacional de Danza Huellas del Mundo! 🌍✨

items.text:
Hej! Szukam osób, które rozwijają się w kierunku filmowym i realizują filmy krótkometrażowe lub pełnometrażowe, ale brakuje im na planie osoby, która dopilnuje organizacji i pomoże spiąć wszystko w całość.

Od kilku lat interesuję się tworzeniem filmów, a od prawie roku aktywnie działam przy produkcjach filmowych. Posiadam doświadczenie jako reżyserka oraz kierownik planu. Jeśli potrzebujesz osoby, która opanuje chaos na planie, zadba o organizację dnia zdjęciowego, będzie wsparciem dla ekipy i pomoże doprowadzić projekt do końca – być może właśnie mnie szukasz.

Chętnie pomogę zarówno na etapie preprodukcji, jak i produkcji filmu. Jestem zorganizowana, komunikatywna, dobrze odnajduję się w pracy z ludźmi i potrafię sprawnie koordynować działania całej ekipy.

Pomagam całkowicie bezpłatnie – robię to, aby rozwijać swoje portfolio, zdobywać kolejne doświadczenie i poznawać ludzi z filmową pasją.

📍 Obszar działania: woj. świętokrzyskie (Starachowice, Kielce, Ostrowiec Świętokrzyski i okolice).

Mogę również bez problemu dojechać do większych miast, takich jak Warszawa, Lublin czy innych miejscowości.

Jeśli szukasz takiej osoby do swojego projektu lub znasz kogoś, komu mogłabym pomóc, zostaw komentarz i dogadamy się!
